title: Scholar CB Modded Compat
description: Adds Scholar' actual book colors in Chiseled Bookshelves compat for different mods
body:
This resourcepack adds compatibility of Scholar actual book colors in Chiseled Bookshelves with different mods I play with (**Atmospheric**, **Autumnity**, **Caverns and Chasms**, **Environmental**, **Endergetic Expansion**, **Upgrade Aquatic**, **Windswept**, **Collector's Reap**)
The big thanks for the Scholar author **mortuusars**, which made a new easy and convenient system of adding support with modded bookshelves.
Firstly, I was doing this for me personally, but I'm sure someone else needs it too.
You can suggest your mods in ther comments.
